categories.label: Card Victory Points
categories.description: Sum of VP values on all cards in your deck (Heroes, Villains, Super-Villains, Equipment, Super Powers, Locations, Kicks)

categories.label: Super-Villain Bonus VP
categories.description: Additional VP from Super-Villain card abilities (e.g. Suicide Squad scaling)

categories.label: Weakness Cards
categories.description: Each Weakness card subtracts 1 VP from your total
